# Sites by Max

> Freelance website design for service businesses (pressure washing,
> landscaping, home services, trades). Custom, mobile-first sites with a flat
> build fee and pay-what-you-want hosting. Built and run by Max Lichter,
> remote, serving the United States.

## Services
- Website build for service businesses — flat $10.46 build fee
- Website hosting — pay-what-you-want, monthly

## Pages
- [Home](https://sitesbymax.com/): what Sites by Max does, portfolio, pricing
- [Pressure Washing Websites](https://sitesbymax.com/pressure-washing-websites): website design for pressure washing businesses, with real client examples
- [Privacy](https://sitesbymax.com/privacy): privacy policy

## Contact
- Website: https://sitesbymax.com/
